arts.ttl: Report: £55m Tottenham target is 'open to leaving' but it might not be good news for Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: Despite the return of Cristian Romero to Tottenham Hotspur training, Ange Postecoglou is yet to welcome several key players back in N17. Partly because of...

arts.ttl: Tottenham drop Mikey Moore team news hint for Hoffenheim as Ange Postecoglou decision made
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou is only facing a handful of Tottenham team selection decisions for the Europa League clash against Hoffenheim with injury issues meaning at least five players are almost guaranteed to start. The Spurs striker has picked up a knee injury that is expected to keep him out for a number of weeks while Pape Matar Sarr appeared to be in discomfort during Tottenham's open training session on Wednesday .

arts.ttl: Man Utd sign £83m-rated talent, long-term Spurs target joins - Marcus Rashford's dream scenario
arts.sum: With Marcus Rashford's potential exit from Manchester United appearing more complex with every passing day, Mirror Football takes a look at what needs to fall into place

arts.ttl: Tottenham guaranteed to be without 14 players for Hoffenheim Europa League clash
arts.sum: Unavailable players: Kinsky, Vicario, Romero, Van de Ven, Udogie, Spence, Reguilon, Bissouma, Sarr, Johnson, Odobert, Werner, Yang, Solanke. Guglielmo Vicario, Destiny Udogie, Ben Davies, Micky van de Ven, Cristian Romero, Wilson Odobert and Richarlison have spent much of that tie on the sidelines, while Rodrigo Bentancur has spent a lengthy period suspended, while he has been out for two weeks now injured too.
Tottenham manager Ange Postecoglou says his players are "giving everything in every game" and have a "fantastic opportunity" to enjoy a successful season.

arts.ttl: Sky Sports: Tottenham Among Frontrunners to Sign ‘Outstanding’ Forward
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are seen as the biggest competitors for RB Leipzig in the race to sign Southampton starlet Tyler Dibling.

arts.ttl: 'I would say': Gary Neville thinks Ange Postecoglou is actually taking a 'massive risk' at Tottenham
Hoffenheim vs Tottenham simulated to predict huge Europa League clash
arts.sum: After tasting defeat again on the weekend, Spurs will be looking to bounce back and pick up a vital three points against Hoffenheim in the Europa League. Antonin Kinsky cannot be registered until the knockout stages meaning Brandon Austin could start in goal, while Djed Spence and Sergio Reguilon are also unavailable, with the duo not part of Spurs' Europa League squad.

arts.ttl: Cesc Fabregas clashed with ex-Tottenham star who called Dele Alli decision 'pathetic'
arts.sum: Dele Alli inked an 18-month deal with Serie A club Como that will see him play under Cesc Fabregas, with the ex-Spurs star hoping to get his once-promising career back on track

arts.ttl: Tottenham XI vs Hoffenheim – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham travel to Hoffenheim on Thursday evening aiming to break into the Europa League’s top eight. Outside the automatic qualification places on goal difference, a win in Germany will take the North Londoners into the top eight ahead of the final league phase fixtures. Ange Postecoglou is desperately trying to salvage a season of struggle. […] The post Tottenham XI vs Hoffenheim – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.
